# User Flow — Google Login Feature
**Artifact ID:** ART-UX-001  
**Workflow Run:** WR-001  
**Generated by:** UI/UX Agent  
**Version:** 1.0  
**Status:** APPROVED (Gate 2 — 2026-05-27T09:35:00Z)

---

## Flow 1: Google Login Happy Path (US-001)

```
[Login Page]
    │
    ├── User nhìn thấy: Email/Password form + nút "Sign in with Google"
    │
    └── User click "Sign in with Google"
            │
            ▼
    [Loading State]
    - Nút đổi thành spinner: "Connecting to Google..."
    - Form email/password bị disabled tạm thời
            │
            ▼
    [Google OAuth Popup / Redirect] ← Mock trong demo
    - Hiện modal chọn tài khoản Google
            │
            ├── User chọn tài khoản Google
            │           │
            │           ▼
            │   [Processing State]
            │   - "Verifying your Google account..."
            │   - Full screen loading overlay
            │           │
            │           ├── [SUCCESS] ──────────────────────────────┐
            │           │                                            ▼
            │           │                               [Dashboard Page /dashboard]
            │           │                               - Success toast: "Welcome back, {name}!"
            │           │                               - Normal dashboard view
            │           │
            │           └── [FAIL - Invalid token] ────────────────┐
            │                                                        ▼
            │                                       [Login Page - Error State]
            │                                       - Error msg: "Google login failed. Please try again."
            │                                       - Google button re-enabled
            │
            └── User cancel/close popup
                        │
                        ▼
            [Login Page - Default State]
            - Không có error message
            - Form và Google button vẫn hoạt động bình thường
```

---

## Flow 2: Account Linking Flow (US-003)

```
[Profile Settings Page /profile/settings]
    │
    ├── Section: "Linked Accounts"
    │   ├── Google: [Not linked] + nút "Link Google Account"
    │
    └── User click "Link Google Account"
            │
            ▼
    [Google OAuth Popup]
    - Chọn tài khoản Google để link
            │
            ├── [SUCCESS]
            │   └── Profile page refresh
            │       - Google: [name@gmail.com] + nút "Unlink"
            │       - Toast: "Google account linked successfully!"
            │
            └── [FAIL]
                └── Error toast: "Failed to link Google account. Please try again."
```

---

## Flow 3: Error Recovery Flow (US-002)

```
[Login Page - Error State]
    - Error message visible
    - "Sign in with Google" button still available
    │
    ├── User click "Sign in with Google" again
    │   └── → Retry Flow 1 từ đầu
    │
    └── User switch sang email/password
        └── → Email login flow (unchanged)
```

---

## Screen States Summary

| Screen | State | Trigger |
|--------|-------|---------|
| Login Page | Default | Page load |
| Login Page | Google Loading | Click Google button |
| Login Page | Error | Google auth fail |
| Dashboard | Success | Auth complete |
| Profile Settings | Default (unlinked) | Not yet linked |
| Profile Settings | Linked | After successful link |
